'''Juvex''' was the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. It was ruled by [[House Sreethyn]] which engaged in the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] trade, and thus was denied [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] membership until shortly before the formation of the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]]. It was later part of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

{{Planet-stub}}
